name: pr_cep_pn_annih_insdel_mixed
drl: rule NE when not D() P() then end
_finding: D-159 (the annihilate cell): a same-epoch explicit plain-D insert+delete pair over `not D() P()` ANNIHILATES in staging (TupleSets addDelete on a still-staged insert) - the not never blocks; same-window P's inserted around the pair stage through it and fire normally (8 firings: 6 prior + P7,P8). The eager per-arrival flush used to fire 14 (P7 retracted at the D-ins flush, then the deferred del released and re-fired the whole join memory). Engine: the plain-not stash gate defers the blocker ins to the fire eval where Staged::add_del cancels it.
